# Data model — UML class diagrams

*Generated by `build_drawio.py` from the ER blocks in `data-model.md`. Do not edit by hand.*

## Silver - source constellation

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class dim_date {
        +date : date [PK]
        +year : int
        +quarter : int
        +month : int
        +month_name : string
        +day_of_week : int
        +day_name : string
        +is_weekend : bool
        +is_us_holiday : bool
        +season : string
    }
    class fact_ticketmaster {
        +tm_snapshot_id : string [PK]
        +event_id : string [FK]
        +snapshot_date : date [FK]
        +status_code : string
        +price_type : string
        +price_currency : string
        +price_min : float
        +price_max : float
        +public_sale_start_utc : datetime
        +public_sale_end_utc : datetime
        +days_to_show : int
    }
    class fact_trends {
        +trends_snapshot_id : string [PK]
        +artist_id : int [FK]
        +dma_code : string [FK]
        +snapshot_date : date [FK]
        +interest : int
        +granularity : string
        +is_partial : bool
        +category : string
    }
    class fact_youtube {
        +youtube_snapshot_id : string [PK]
        +artist_id : int [FK]
        +snapshot_date : date [FK]
        +official_subscribers : int
        +official_total_views : int
        +official_video_count : int
        +topic_total_views : int
        +topic_video_count : int
    }
    class dim_event {
        +event_id : string [PK]
        +event_name : string
        +event_type : string
        +show_date : date [FK]
        +show_time : string
        +timezone : string
        +primary_genre : string
        +event_url : string
        +venue_id : int [FK]
    }
    class dim_venue {
        +venue_id : int [PK]
        +ticketmaster_venue_id : string [UK]
        +venue_name : string
        +dma_code : string [FK]
        +ticketmaster_market_id : string
        +capacity : int
        +venue_type : string
        +city : string
        +state_code : string
        +postal_code : string
        +address : string
        +latitude : float
        +longitude : float
    }
    class dim_geo {
        +dma_code : string [PK]
        +geo_code : string
        +metro_name : string
        +state : string
    }
    class dim_artist {
        +artist_id : int [PK]
        +artist_name : string
        +trends_query : string
        +primary_genre : string
        +yt_channel_id : string [UK]
        +ticketmaster_attraction_id : string [UK]
    }
    class bridge_event_artist {
        +event_id : string [PK,FK]
        +artist_id : int [PK,FK]
        +is_headliner : bool
        +billing_order : int
    }
    dim_date "1" -- "0..*" fact_ticketmaster : snapshot_date
    dim_date "1" -- "0..*" fact_trends : snapshot_date
    dim_date "1" -- "0..*" fact_youtube : snapshot_date
    dim_date "1" -- "0..*" dim_event : show_date
    dim_event "1" -- "0..*" fact_ticketmaster : event_id
    dim_venue "1" -- "0..*" dim_event : venue_id
    dim_geo "1" -- "0..*" dim_venue : dma_code
    dim_geo "1" -- "0..*" fact_trends : dma_code
    dim_artist "1" -- "0..*" fact_trends : artist_id
    dim_artist "1" -- "0..*" fact_youtube : artist_id
    dim_event "1" -- "0..*" bridge_event_artist : event_id
    dim_artist "1" -- "0..*" bridge_event_artist : artist_id
```
